name: the-code-breaker
description: Walter Isaacson's biography of Jennifer Doudna — understanding CRISPR gene editing, the dynamics of scientific discovery, and the ethics of editing human DNA.
useCase: Understanding CRISPR science, navigating patent races, debating gene editing ethics, succeeding in science careers.
knownRisks: The science of CRISPR is advancing rapidly — some specifics may have evolved since publication
The patent dispute details are complex and interpretations may differ
Some readers may disagree with Isaacson's framing of Doudna as the central figure
